title: alectra indica
intro: Alectra indica, also known as the "devil's tooth," is a climbing plant in the family Orobanchaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues, with its extracts exhibiting antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alectra indica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Alectra indica is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer relief from various health conditions.
